channel.title: Redmi K Pad MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Redmi K Pad MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.305.0.WAOCNXM Fastboot update for Redmi K Pad China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi K Pad China

Codename: turner

Version: OS3.0.305.0.WAOCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.8 GB

MD5: fb6545f30ef5e098ad0469ff0f6177e7

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WAOMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi Pad Mini Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi Pad Mini Global

Codename: turner

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WAOMIXM | 16.0

Size: 8.2 GB

MD5: e55d6b42ae1058491bd11c9563879dff

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
New: View all the important info at a glance with Xiaomi HyperIsland
New: Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Visual feedback when you adjust screen brightness with the keyboard
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi tablets now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.305.0.WAOCNXM Recovery update for Redmi K Pad China
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi K Pad China

Codename: turner

Version: OS3.0.305.0.WAOCNXM | 16.0

Size: 7.7 GB

MD5: 34ce2cd6bcf0f1a89b3d138eb09eaca6

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WAOTWXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi Pad Mini Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi Pad Mini Taiwan

Codename: turner

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WAOTWXM | 16.0

Size: 7.3 GB

MD5: 861eb552f6321eb6ff4ceb64b3dadf7c

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
New: View all the important info at a glance with Xiaomi HyperIsland
New: Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Visual feedback when you adjust screen brightness with the keyboard
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi tablets now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WAOMIXM Recovery update for Xiaomi Pad Mini Global
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi Pad Mini Global

Codename: turner

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WAOMIXM | 16.0

Size: 6.2 GB

MD5: 2e67cb3d0f1670db6de628d149bd670d

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
New: View all the important info at a glance with Xiaomi HyperIsland
New: Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Visual feedback when you adjust screen brightness with the keyboard
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi tablets now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
New: View all the important info at a glance with Xiaomi HyperIsland
New: Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Visual feedback when you adjust screen brightness with the keyboard
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi tablets now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup
